_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py). REAL-TIME deployable (single model per sensor + coasting, all <40ms CPU) = 0.704; OFFLINE max (cross-grid ensemble + TTA) = 0.715. Final gain: retraining the deployed models to 100 epochs (patience 15) recovered EVK4 0.859->0.874 and Thuraya3 raw 0.469->0.524 from fuller convergence.

real_time.config: per-sensor: EVK4->g192_ctx_v2, DAVIS+Stars3->g256_hn (grid-256 hard-neg), Thuraya3->g192_ctx_v2 + coasting Kalman. 100-epoch models. All sensors <40ms CPU.

offline.config: router: EVK4->cross-grid ensemble+TTA, DAVIS/DVX->temporal+TTA, Stars3->g256_hn, Thuraya3->v2 coasted
offline.note: max accuracy; cross-grid ensemble+TTA ~211ms -> NOT real-time

dvx_levers.note: grid-256 separates the star field; hard-neg mining suppresses background-star FPs; coasting Kalman recovers dim windows; 100-epoch convergence lifts EVK4 and Thuraya3.

latency_note: Deployed real-time config: single model per sensor (g192_ctx_v2 + g256_hn) + coasting, CPU streaming (batch=1) -> 15-38 ms/window, all sensors under 40ms. Offline variant (0.715, cross-grid+TTA) is ~211ms.
